acquisition method: MS data were acquired using a DDA top 15 method
alkylation reagent: free thiols cysteines were N-ethylmaleimide alkylated
cleavage agent: proteins were digested overnight by trypsin
fragmentation method: For HCD spectra, resolution was set to 15,000
instrument: injected on a nLC-ESI-MS/MS quadrupole Orbitrap QExactive-HF mass spectrometer
ionization type: connected to an Easy-nLC 1200 (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
